verdict.answer_first: B states the action immediately: "Truncate it in place rather than deleting and recreating it"; A also answers early but adds more setup.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to the main recommendation with "The simplest way: : > /path/to/logfile" and keeps alternatives secondary; A gives more caveat-heavy guidance.
